hero.title: Transform your training into
hero.subtitle: Culture converts your course materials into adaptive, gamified learning journeys. Your learners progress faster, stay motivated, and you measure it all in real time.

howItWorks.title: From your content to an engaging workshop
howItWorks.subtitle: in 3 steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: PDF, Word, video, images... Culture accepts all your existing formats. No need to start from scratch.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our AI identifies key knowledge blocks and builds an adaptive learning path with quizzes, challenges, and spaced repetition.
howItWorks.step3Desc: They advance at their own pace on web or mobile, unlock badges, and you track their progress in real time.

features.title: Everything you need,
features.f1Desc: The learning path adjusts in real time based on each learner's level and mistakes. No one gets left behind.
features.f2Desc: Points, badges, leaderboards, streaks. Playful engagement serving real learning objectives.
features.f3Desc: PDF, Word, PowerPoint, video, images — import what you already have. Culture does the rest.
features.f4Desc: Clear dashboards to see who's progressing, who's stuck, and which concepts are causing issues.
features.f5Desc: Auto-generate and auto-grade certification exams. Save hours every week.
features.f6Desc: Share a link with your learners. No installation, no configuration on their end.

marie.content: I uploaded my 80-slide Excel course. In 10 minutes, I had a complete path with quizzes and badges. My learners are 3x more engaged.

thomas.content: We cut onboarding training time from 3 days to 1.5 days. New hires arrive better prepared and more motivated. Clear ROI.

sophie.content: Auto-generating exams saves me 4 hours a week. And certification pass rates improved by 22%.

create.title: Create your first workshop
create.subtitle: No need to be a pedagogy expert. Culture automatically structures your expertise into an engaging learning journey.

step1.title: 1. Import your materials
step1.desc: Drag and drop your existing files. PDF courses, PowerPoint presentations, training videos, Word documents — everything is accepted.

step2.title: 2. Customize the learning path
step2.desc: The AI proposes a smart structure. Adjust the order, add steps, configure difficulty. You stay in control of the content.

step3.title: 3. Invite your learners
step3.desc: A link, a QR code, or a direct integration into your existing tool. Your learners access it without complex sign-up.

step4.title: 4. Track and improve
step4.desc: Visualize progress, identify bottlenecks, adjust content. The feedback loop is continuous and automatic.

about.title: Making learning
about.story:
Culture was born from a simple observation: professional training is too often boring, too long, and too quickly forgotten. Trainers spend hours creating content that learners just skim through.

What if technology could change that? AI can now transform any content into an adaptive, engaging learning path — like Duolingo did for languages, but for any skill domain.

Culture is that tool. Built for trainers who have the expertise but not the time. For learners who genuinely want to progress. For organizations that need to measure the impact of every euro invested in training.

values.title: Our values
values.v1Desc: Gamification and AI are means, not ends. Every feature is designed to improve real learning outcomes.
values.v2Desc: A trainer must be able to create their first workshop in 10 minutes, with zero prior training.
values.v3Desc: You deserve to know whether your training actually works. We give you the data to prove it.

editor.subtitle: created manually or reworked with AI
editor.titleHint: optional — if filled, replaces the statement as the title shown in the question bank
editor.qTypeHint: Text by default · Visual (image, chart) and Audio available
editor.visualEdit: edit image — basic tool coming soon
editor.audioComing: 🎙️ audio recording / import — tool coming soon
editor.contentHintFill: use « ___ » to mark each blank to fill
editor.contentPlaceholder: Write or paste the question statement…
editor.hintSurveyA: poll without correction · « free response » option available
editor.hintSurveyB: enable the ✎ icon on an option to allow a free response
editor.hintMatching: match each item to its counterpart
editor.hintOrder: the order of the list below is the correct order
editor.shuffleHint: shuffles the option order for each student
editor.answerHintFill: expected answers for each blank, comma-separated, in order
editor.answerHintDessin: description or reference image for grading (drawing tool coming soon)
editor.answerHintAudio: transcript or expected elements in the audio answer
editor.freeAnswerHint: no reference answer is expected (e.g. essay)
editor.noAnswerNote: this question has no attached answer — no grading will be offered.
editor.difficultyHint: off by default — annotates the question difficulty
editor.durationHint: off by default — allotted time, only for projected exams
editor.partsIntro: A question can have several independent parts (distinct statements and response types).
editor.labelsHint: off by default — groups questions to generate exams

choices.freeTextMarker: free response — the student writes whatever they want
choices.needCorrect: mark at least one correct answer by checking the matching option

bank.title: Question bank
bank.deleteQuestionInExams: It will be removed from the following exams:
bank.deleteLabelCount: It will be removed from {count} question(s).

generator.title: Exam editor
generator.subtitle: questions follow in this order — drag to reorder
generator.checkToAdd: check to add to the exam
generator.label: title
generator.replaceFavorite: replace favorite with the current presentation
generator.emptySection: empty section — drag a question here
generator.removeSectionDesc: The {count} question(s) in this section will no longer be in the exam and will return to the sent questions list.
generator.clearDescEditing: Your current changes will be discarded. The already saved exam is not affected.
generator.clearDesc: The title, sections, weighting and sent questions will be reset.
generator.saveAnywayDesc: {count} question(s) in this exam {plural} (no attached answer or no statement).
generator.applyFavoriteDesc: The presentation section will be replaced by your favorite.
generator.replaceFavoriteDesc: Saves the current presentation as favorite. It will replace the previous favorite.
generator.removeQuestionDesc: It is checked in the current exam — removing it from the sent questions list will also remove it from the preview.

tab.editorBusyDesc: The exam editor already has changes in progress. Finish or clear the editor before editing {target}.
tab.introSubtitle: Three steps to go from your question bank to a ready-to-give exam.
tab.introStep1Text: Create your questions manually or let the AI handle it from the workshop files.
tab.introStep2Text: Send your questions to the editor, drag them into sections, adjust weighting and difficulty.
tab.introStep3Text: The exam is ready: PDF export, online sitting, projection, or integration into the learning program.
